Package neqsim.process.materials

Class MaterialReviewResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.materials.MaterialReviewResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MaterialReviewResult extends Object implements Serializable
Complete materials-review result for one item.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
